title: Web Developer
summary: Web Developer and Designer at a web design and development agency. Fully remote. Building complete WordPress sites from scratch — custom themes, Gutenberg blocks, plugins, Kadence and Elementor builds, the WordHerd custom theme framework, and React-based WordPress integrations. Also handling UI/UX design across client projects.
achievements: Built complete WordPress websites for clients — custom themes, plugins, and block-based layouts
Developed and extended the WordHerd custom theme framework used across client projects
Created custom Gutenberg blocks and Elementor/Kadence components to match design specs
Integrated React-based features into WordPress projects
Handled UI/UX design alongside development — wireframes, mockups, and final interfaces
Managed updates, performance, and maintenance for existing client sites
